sophie-bluel.title: Sophie Bluel – Interior Architect
sophie-bluel.description: Development of a dynamic portfolio in JavaScript with API integration, project filtering, and an admin interface. This project also introduced me to Agile working methods.

kasa.title: Kasa
kasa.description: Creation of a responsive real estate application with React and Sass, based on reusable components and a clean front-end architecture.

mon-vieux-grimoire.title: Mon Vieux Grimoire
mon-vieux-grimoire.description: Back-end development of a book rating API with Node.js, Express and MongoDB, including authentication, CRUD operations and secure data handling.

booki.title: Booki
booki.description: Front-end development of a responsive landing page with HTML and CSS, focusing on accessibility, semantic markup and performance optimization.

nina.title: Nina Carducci
nina.description: Auditing, optimization and accessibility improvements of an existing website, with a focus on performance, SEO and user experience.

menu.title: Menu-Maker
menu.description: Development of a responsive restaurant website with HTML and CSS, including animations, a mobile-first approach and accessibility best practices.
